appInfoLoading: App info is still loading. Try again shortly.
autoStartHint: Starts in the tray without opening the main window.
deepseekBaseUrlHint: Leave blank to use the official DeepSeek API. For self-hosted deployments, enter your OpenAI-compatible endpoint, for example http://127.0.0.1:8000/v1.
deepseekOfficialV1CompatHint: When enabled, official DeepSeek requests use /v1/chat/completions. When disabled, they use /chat/completions. Custom upstream URLs are not affected.
codexAdapterMissing: Codex adapter catalog is not ready.
ccsApiKeyHint: Enter the real API key required by CCS for this import. CodeSeeX uses it only to build this one deep link and does not save it.
feedbackUnavailable: No feedback URL is configured for this version.
licenseUnavailable: No license page is available for this version.
noLogsDetail: Events appear after starting the proxy or sending a request.
productDescription: Local Codex and DeepSeek bridge with a desktop manager.
proxyListenPortHint: Used by the local Codex API endpoint. Restart the proxy after changing it.
restartRequired: Some changes require restarting the proxy
sourceUnavailable: No source repository URL is configured for this version.
startingDetail: Checking stale processes and starting service...
toolResult: Tool result returned to the model.
networkProxyModeHint: Used by upstream requests, Web Search, Vision, and update checks. Restart the proxy after changing it.
updateCheckFailed: Unable to check updates right now. {error}
updateCurrent: You are already on the latest version: {current}
viewAboutSubtitle: Version info, data paths, and future extension notes.
viewConfigSubtitle: Transparent local app settings. Changes are autosaved; some proxy settings require a manual restart.
viewConsoleSubtitle: Check balance, proxy state, and Codex TOML before using Codex.
viewLogsSubtitle: Clean user-level runtime events; usage detail stays in Usage.
viewUsageSubtitle: Review completed conversation records, token usage, latency, and estimated cost.
toolApplyPatchDescription: Native Codex patch editor for precise file changes. This system tool follows Codex settings.
toolWebSearchDescription: Search the web and open public pages with the configured network proxy policy.
toolMcpServerDescription: Use MCP tools discovered by Codex. Server configuration stays in Codex.
toolListDirectoryDescription: Browse workspace folders with depth limits, filters, and compact metadata.
toolReadFileRangeDescription: Read selected UTF-8 text lines from workspace files. Images and binary files are rejected.
toolWorkspaceSearchDescription: Find text across workspace files with include/exclude filters and line matches.
toolVisionDescription: Analyze images and generate images with configured OpenAI-compatible endpoints. Use /responses by default.
visionAnalyzeRequestUrlHint: Complete OpenAI-compatible image understanding endpoint. Local image pixels are sent to this endpoint.
visionAnalyzeModelHint: Model name sent to the Vision analyze endpoint.
visionGenerateRequestUrlHint: Complete OpenAI-compatible image generation endpoint. Prefer /responses; use /images/generations only for the official image-model API.
visionGenerateModelHint: Model name sent to the Vision image generation endpoint.
visionApiKeyHint: Bearer token used by the Vision module.
dashboardBalanceSubtitle: Balance, local proxy state, and Codex connection config.
dashboardReadinessSubtitle: Wait for the client to finish loading, then prepare the local proxy.
dashboardClientReadyHint: Window, UI assets, language pack, and settings are available.
dashboardLocalDataReadyHint: TOML, catalog, and tool settings are ready for this build.
dashboardPortCheckHint: Detect whether the local API port is free, owned by CodeSeeX, or occupied by another app.
dashboardProxyHealthHint: Start the embedded proxy and confirm the local endpoint is usable.
dashboardProxyStartHint: The dashboard keeps this compact; full usage details live in Usage.
usageFoldedHint: Current data is shown as folded records; backend conversation grouping can refine this later.
usageStageRequestHint: Model request, selected model, and routing information.
usageStageInputHint: Cached and cache-miss input tokens for this record.
usageStageOutputHint: Tokens returned by the model in the final response.
logCleanHint: Only key user-level runtime events are expanded here; usage detail belongs in Usage.
aboutProductDescription: Local Codex bridge with a desktop manager, proxy, catalog, and tool controls.
aboutFooterNote:
通过本地桌面管理器连接 Codex 与已配置的模型服务
请使用合规的 API 凭证与端点，并遵守相关服务提供方的使用条款
